steps.title: Identify the structures
steps.content: The blank separates two independent clauses: many are still well known and Koulsy Lamko, for example, is a celebrated playwright from Chad.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content:
A colon introduces information that exemplifies or elaborates on a preceding clause, which is exactly what Option B does by introducing Koulsy Lamko as a concrete example supporting the claim about well-known writers.

The other options either fail to punctuate correctly or break parallel structure. That matches choice B — B is correct.
